ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, return) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Any discount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "loyalty_member" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is a loyalty member */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of customer's orders */,
  "number_of_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the item */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the item */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for inventory management */,
  "safety_stock" INTEGER /* Safety stock level for inventory management */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for replenishment */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the item details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the category details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the store */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the store */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., physical, online) */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the store details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the manager details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "transaction_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction item */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the transaction */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item in the transaction */,
  "item_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the specific item in the transaction */,
  "item_tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the specific item in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "association_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association rule */,
  "antecedent" TEXT /* List of item IDs in the antecedent */,
  "consequent" TEXT /* List of item IDs in the consequent */,
  "support" REAL /* Support of the association rule */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence of the association rule */,
  "lift" REAL /* Lift of the association rule */,
  "antecedent_items" TEXT /* List of item IDs in the antecedent (redundant, but can be useful for complex queries) */,
  "consequent_items" TEXT /* List of item IDs in the consequent (redundant, but can be useful for complex queries) */,
  "rule_strength" REAL /* Strength of the association rule (additional metric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_association_rules_antecedent FOREIGN KEY ("antecedent") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_association_rules_consequent FOREIGN KEY ("consequent") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended item */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., MBA, manual) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the campaign */,
  "campaign_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the campaign */,
  "campaign_results" TEXT /* Results of the campaign (e.g., ROI, customer engagement) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the campaign details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_items" (
  "campaign_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign item */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage for the item */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, buy one get one free) */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the campaign item details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_items_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_customers" (
  "campaign_customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign customer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "engagement_status" TEXT /* Engagement status of the customer (e.g., engaged, not engaged) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date the customer engaged with the campaign */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the campaign customer details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_customers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_customers_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
